codeReview.summary: The input helper additions and workflow-state tests are useful, but the concrete OpenAI voice adapters still do not close the parity gaps called out by VAL-VO-002. The STT adapter never performs the upstream session handshake/configuration flow and still ignores runtime STT settings, while the TTS adapter only records voice/model/speed in an internal struct that never reaches any request path.

issues.description: `OpenAISTTModel::start_session` still just returns an in-memory accumulator session. It never models or validates the upstream `transcription_session.created` / `transcription_session.updated` handshake that VAL-VO-002 and the pinned Python tests require, so streamed STT handshake parity is still missing.

`OpenAISTTModel::transcribe` still ignores `STTModelSettings` entirely (`_settings`), so the new pipeline plumbing does not reach the real OpenAI STT adapter for model/language/prompt selection. The feature claims preserved model settings, but the concrete adapter behavior is unchanged.

`synthesize()` builds a request containing model/voice/speed, but then discards those fields and emits audio derived only from `request.text`. Default/custom voice behavior is therefore not forwarded into any runtime request path, leaving VAL-VO-002's configurable TTS behavior unmet despite the added tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature preconditions required reading the pinned Python voice input/STT/TTS tests, but the transcript skeleton only opened `test_openai_stt.py` and `test_openai_tts.py`. It never opened the upstream `test_input.py`, `test_pipeline.py`, or `test_workflow.py` files that cover the other VAL-VO-001/002 voice families.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript skeleton at /Users/staticpayload/.factory/artifacts/tool-outputs/grep_tool_cli-call_E3uN6xVeW73k338qrn7blrp0-09776054.log shows reads for `reference/openai-agents-python/tests/voice/test_openai_stt.py` and `test_openai_tts.py`, but no reads for `test_input.py`, `test_pipeline.py`, or `test_workflow.py`.

summary: Review failed. The commit improves helper/test coverage, but the concrete OpenAI STT/TTS adapters still do not implement the handshake and settings-forwarding behavior required for voice parity. Report written to `.factory/validation/realtime-voice-parity/scrutiny/reviews/implement-voice-input-stt-tts-and-workflow-parity.json`.
